name: ai-analysis-policy
description: Defines AI analysis behaviour for the Layer 5 AI Analysis Layer — analysis modes, input handling, output generation, and quality thresholds.

analysisModes.description: Available analysis modes — Gemini analysis is analysis-only, never crawls

inputHandling.description: How Layer 5 receives and processes input from Layer 4

outputGeneration.description: Output generation behaviour — structured JSON, CMS content, SEO metadata

qualityThresholds.description: Minimum quality thresholds for analysis output
